description: Instruction text begins to appear on the screen, starting with a greeting.
frame_description: A dark screen with white text appearing at the bottom.

description: A significant portion of the task scenario text is displayed, outlining a holiday planning task.
frame_description: A large block of white text on a dark background describing a travel planning scenario.

description: The remaining task instructions are revealed incrementally, providing more detail on the planning process.
frame_description: The instruction text continues to populate the screen line by line.

description: The browser interface appears, showing the final task prompt and an 'Open' button to begin the session.
frame_description: A Chrome browser window is visible with a final instruction and a prominent 'Open' button.

description: User types 'web' into the Google search bar
User clicks on the 'webjet' search suggestion
Page navigates to Google search results for 'webjet'
The 'Askable Sessions' browser tab becomes highlighted
User hovers over the 'Askable Sessions' tab, triggering a status tooltip
frame_description: A tooltip appears showing tab sharing status and memory usage

description: The tab status tooltip disappears as the cursor moves away
User waits for the flight search results to load while viewing the loading animation and flight summary.
frame_description: Loading screen displaying 'Maroochydore to London (Return)' with a progress animation.

description: The flight search results finish loading, transitioning from the loading animation to the list of available airfares and filters.
frame_description: The UI updates from a loading state to show flight options from Qantas, Virgin Australia, and others.

description: User dwells on the flight search results page, likely reviewing the first Qantas Airways flight option.
frame_description: Flight search results page showing various airline options and filters. The cursor is stationary at the bottom of the first flight result.

description: User dwells on the screen with the cursor positioned over the 'Repeat the task instructions' button.
frame_description: The user is viewing the main session screen with a prompt and two interactive buttons at the bottom.

description: User clicks the 'Repeat the task instructions' button, initiating a UI transition.
The UI state changes significantly, first zooming in on the button and then shifting it to the right edge of the screen as the system processes the request.
frame_description: The screen content undergoes a zoom and translation animation, moving the focus of the interface.

description: User clicked the 'Repeat the task instructions' button
frame_description: The user positions the cursor over the 'Repeat the task instructions' button and clicks.

description: The UI state changed, displaying a new interface with horizontal bars after the interaction
frame_description: The screen transitions to a different visual state following the button click.

description: User hovers over the 'Passengers' selection in the flight search summary bar.
frame_description: Flight search summary bar showing date, class, and passenger count.

description: User waits on the loading screen while flight search results for Brisbane to London are being retrieved.
frame_description: Loading screen with animation showing flight path between Brisbane and London.

description: The flight search results page finishes loading and displays the list of available flights and filtering options.
frame_description: Transition from loading animation to the flight results grid.

description: The 'Stops' filter options (1 Stop, 2+ Stops) appear in the sidebar and a '1 more flight option' expander appears in the search results, shifting the page content.
frame_description: Flight search results page showing airline filters and a sidebar.

description: User clicks on the 'Qatar Airways' airline filter tab to filter the flight results.
frame_description: Zoomed view of the airline filter tabs at the top of the search results.

description: The loading screen cycles through search criteria, alternating between departure and return date views.
frame_description: A loading screen showing 'Brisbane to London (Return)' with cycling date information.

description: The flight search results page finishes loading, displaying a list of available flights and prices.
frame_description: The transition from a loading animation to the full search results page with filters and airline listings.

description: Scroll up (magnitude: 3.6, uniformity: 0.67)
Scroll up (magnitude: 3.6, uniformity: 0.67)
User hovers over the '2 more flight options' button in the flight results list
frame_description: The user is viewing flight search results and has their cursor positioned over a button to expand more flight options for a specific itinerary.
